calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset And Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandt Andersson for Ann Zuppan (Petitioner).

Mr. Andersson stated that the Decedent signed the estate documents the same day she put the house into the trust, that she became ill, that the house was removed in 1996 to do a refinance and to make improvements to the house for health needs, and that they just assumed it was still in the trust. Mr. Anderrson also stated that he believes the Trustor passed away in 2008, that the house was left to the Sister and the Daughter, and that the Sister passed away last year. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset and Successor Trustee is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset And Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To Apr-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
